name: proxy
description: Soft proxy: probe http_proxy reachability and either set machine-scope http_proxy/https_proxy/no_proxy env vars (Weizmann on-campus) or clear them (off-campus / home network). Override with -ForceMode use|direct.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\proxy-verify.log'; ${smoke}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\proxy-smoke.txt'; ${expected}='http://bcproxy.weizmann.ac.il:8080'; ${got}=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('http_proxy','Machine'); ${smokeBody}=Get-Content $smoke -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($smokeBody -match 'mode=use') { if (${got} -eq ${expected}) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value ('proxy mode=use http_proxy=' + ${got}) } else { ('proxy smoke says use but env is wrong: got=' + ${got} + ' expected=' + ${expected}) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 } } elseif ($smokeBody -match 'mode=direct') { if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty(${got})) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value 'proxy mode=direct http_proxy=(empty)' } else { ('proxy smoke says direct but http_proxy is still set: ' + ${got}) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 } } else { ('unrecognized smoke body: ' + $smokeBody) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
